data.title: SmartCentres REIT GAAP EPS of C$0.71, revenue of C$133.22M
data.description:
• SmartCentres REIT press release (OTCPK:CWYUF): Q2 GAAP EPS of C$0.71.
  • Revenue of C$133.22M (+2.6% Y/Y).
  • FFO per Unit for the three months ended June 30, 2024 was $0.50 compared to $0.55 for the same period in 2023.

data.title: Bath & Body Works declares $0.20 dividend
data.description:
• Bath & Body Works (NYSE:BBWI) declared $0.20/share quarterly dividend, in line with previous.
  • Forward yield 2.51%
  • Payable Sept. 6; for shareholders of record Aug. 23; ex-div Aug. 23.
  • See BBWI Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: WEBTOON Entertainment reports Non-GAAP EPS of $0.20
data.description:
• WEBTOON Entertainment Inc. press release (NASDAQ:WBTN): Q2 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.20.
  • Total revenue of $321.0 million.
  • Net loss of $76.6 million was primarily driven by one-time IPO-related costs and stock-based compensation expenses.
  • Adjusted EBITDA of $22.4 million represented a significant increase from a slight loss in the prior year, marking strong profit improvement for the second consecutive quarter.
  • Diluted EPS was a loss of $0.70 which increased from a loss of $0.18 in the prior year.

data.title: Texas Roadhouse declares $0.61 dividend
data.description:
• Texas Roadhouse (NASDAQ:TXRH) declared $0.61/share quarterly dividend, in line with previous.
  • Forward yield 1.45%
  • Payable Sept. 24; for shareholders of record Sept. 4; ex-div Sept. 4.
  • See TXRH Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: Proficient Auto Logistics beats top-line and bottom-line estimates
data.description:
• Proficient Auto Logistics press release (NASDAQ:PAL): Q2 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.28 beats by $0.08.
  • Revenue of $106.61M (+5.8% Y/Y) beats by $4.92M.
  • Adjusted Operating Ratio of 91.8% compared to 92.7% in 2023.
  • Total Units delivered of 507,712 in 2024, an increase of 10.5%.

data.title: Monopar Therapeutics to implement 1-for-5 reverse stock split
data.description:
• Monopar Therapeutics (NASDAQ:MNPR) said it will effect a 1-for-5 reverse stock split of its outstanding shares of common stock.
  • The company said that the reverse stock split is an effort to regain compliance with Nasdaq's listing rules.

data.title: Total Energy Services GAAP EPS of C$0.39, revenue of C$213.33M
data.description:
• Total Energy Services press release (OTCPK:TOTZF): Q2 GAAP EPS of C$0.39.
  • Revenue of C$213.33M (+2.1% Y/Y).

data.title: Bread Financial to partially repurchase $237.6 million of convertible notes
data.description:
• Bread Financial (NYSE:BFH) said it has entered into separate repurchase agreements for the partial repurchase of $237.6 million aggregate principal amount of its 4.25% convertible senior notes due 2028.
  • The repurchase is for an aggregate price of ~$350 million.
  • After the closing of the repurchases, ~ $78.6 million principal amount of the Notes will remain outstanding, from an initial issued principal balance of $316.25 million.
